steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: Mrs. Henderson家brunch。你认识Kevin和Lisa。Mrs. Henderson说了尴尬的话。Kevin私下问你意见。
steps.text_cn: （Mrs. Henderson家brunch。你认识Kevin和Lisa。Mrs. Henderson说了尴尬的话。Kevin私下问你意见。）

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: It's the first time everyone is together in Mrs. Henderson's apartment. The room is warm, loud, and full of food.
steps.text_cn: （这是大家第一次一起聚在Mrs. Henderson家里。屋子里暖暖的、热热闹闹的，到处都是食物的香味。）

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: 周末。你去Mrs. Henderson家参加brunch。敲门进去，看到两个新面孔。
steps.text_cn: （周末。你去Mrs. Henderson家参加brunch。敲门进去，看到两个新面孔。）

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: (点头)

steps.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
steps.text: Come in, dear! Everyone, this is 4B!

steps.speaker: Kevin:** _(点头)_ "Hey. Kevin. 3B."**Lisa
steps.text: Hi!! I'm Lisa! 2B! So nice to meet you!

steps.instruction:
📍 题目1
Lisa says "So nice to meet you!" What do you say?

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: 大家坐下来吃东西。Mrs. Henderson做了很多食物。
steps.text_cn: （大家坐下来吃东西。Mrs. Henderson做了很多食物。）

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: (看向你)

steps.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
steps.text: Please, eat! Try the scones!

steps.speaker: Jake
steps.text: Mrs. H, these are SO good.

steps.speaker: Lisa
steps.text: Oh my god, delicious!

steps.instruction:
📍 题目2
Mrs. Henderson asks "Do you like it?" The food is very good. You say:

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: At first, everything feels easy and fun. Then the conversation changes, and the room suddenly feels awkward.
steps.text_cn: （一开始，一切都轻松又愉快。可接着，话题突然变了，屋里的气氛一下子变得有点尴尬。）

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: 大家聊了一会儿。然后Mrs. Henderson突然说——
steps.text_cn: （大家聊了一会儿。然后Mrs. Henderson突然说——）

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: Kevin脸红了。Lisa愣了一秒。

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: Jake小声跟你说：

steps.speaker: Mrs. Henderson
steps.text: Lisa, you and Kevin should go to that food festival! You both love Thai food!

steps.speaker: Lisa
steps.text: Maybe! We'll see.

steps.speaker: Jake
steps.text: Kevin likes Lisa.

steps.instruction:
📍 题目3
Lisa says "Maybe! We'll see." She means:

options.label: B
options.text: She doesn't want to say yes or no

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: Lisa leaves quickly. Kevin stays, but he looks embarrassed. When the others are busy, he quietly asks you what you think.
steps.text_cn: （Lisa很快就走了。Kevin留了下来，可看起来很不好意思。等别人都在忙时，他悄悄来问你怎么看。）

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: Brunch结束了。Lisa先走了。Kevin留下来洗碗。你在收桌子。Kevin过来小声问你。
steps.text_cn: （Brunch结束了。Lisa先走了。Kevin留下来洗碗。你在收桌子。Kevin过来小声问你。）

steps.speaker: Kevin
steps.text: Hey... was that weird?

steps.speaker: You
steps.text: What do you mean?

steps.speaker: Kevin
steps.text: Me and Lisa. Am I weird?

steps.speaker: You
steps.text: No. I think she just needs time.

steps.speaker: Kevin
steps.text: Yeah... you're right. Thanks.

steps.instruction:
📍 题目4
"She just needs time" means:

options.label: B
options.text: She's not ready yet — give her space

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: That night, the awkward moment isn't over yet. Lisa messages you directly.
steps.text_cn: （那天晚上，那份尴尬并没有真正结束。Lisa直接给你发来了私信。）

steps.speaker: 旁白
steps.text: 你回到家。手机震动。Lisa私信你。

steps.speaker: Lisa
steps.text: Hey — sorry if today was awkward.

steps.speaker: You
steps.text: It's okay!

steps.speaker: Lisa
steps.text: Can we get coffee sometime? Just us?

steps.speaker: You
steps.text: Sure!

steps.speaker: Lisa
steps.text: Cool 😊

steps.instruction:
📍 题目5
Lisa asks "Can we get coffee sometime?" You want to say yes. Which is most natural?

options.label: C
options.text: "I will think about it and let you know later."  太疏远

steps.instruction:
题目6
Your neighbor made food for you. It's very good. Say:

题目7
Someone invites you somewhere but you're not sure. You say:
